description: A mine supervisor is monitoring a drilling operation and needs to ensure the drill is following the planned pattern.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the drill and blast plan for the current section of the mine.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up the plan, which shows the required locations and depths for the drill holes.

nodes.task_description: Check the drill's GPS data to verify it is positioned at the correct coordinates for the next hole.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the drill's current position matches the plan.

nodes.task_description: Log the completion of a drill hole, including the actual depth drilled.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent logs the completed hole in the mine management system.
